HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

8// Construct SIEForm and compute angular frequency from vacuum wavelength.
9SIEForm::SIEForm(std::vector<RWGFun> *inRWGFuns, GreenF *inGrnFun,
10 std::vector<IncidentField *> *inIncFields,
11 dcmplx inVacWavelength)
12 : rwgFuns(inRWGFuns),
13 grnFun(inGrnFun),
14 incFields(inIncFields),
15 omega(2 * PI / inVacWavelength * CVAC) {}

17// Virtual destructor (no ownership implied).
18SIEForm::~SIEForm() {}
